Notes: Kristen Caban led New Paltz with 15 points and Artie Williams finished with
12 points, nine rebounds and five steals. Casey Clark paced Plattsburgh with
11 points and a game high 17 rebounds.
Game.Officials: Donald Cooper,  Frank Kennelly,  Jose Rodriguez
